mapper.select: select id, product_id, version_no, base_info_json, params_json, version_status, status_at_submit, submitted_at, created_at from advisor_product_version where id = #{id}

select id, product_id, version_no, base_info_json, params_json, version_status, status_at_submit, submitted_at, created_at from advisor_product_version where product_id = #{productId} and version_status = 'SUBMITTED' order by version_no desc limit 1
